title: What led to Iran-US ceasefire talks collapse after 21-hour marathon in Islamabad
summary_full: High-stakes US-Iran talks in Islamabad concluded without a ceasefire or broader diplomatic framework after 21 hours. Key differences, particularly Iran's nuclear program, remain unresolved. Despite the setback, both nations signaled a willingness to continue discussions, with Iran urging the US to drop 'excessive demands' and recognize its rights.
